division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title

markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 10. Registration of Trailer Coaches [5350 - 5354]
##### § 5352

Subject to the exemptions stated in Section 5353, registration of any trailer coach in this state is required annually.

*(Amended by Stats. 1981, Ch. 975, Sec. 38.)*

subsections.text: Subject to the exemptions stated in Section 5353, registration of any trailer coach in this state is required annually.
